title: Plus1 Game Spec
description: Schema for a single co-op game spec used by the plus1.games pipeline.

id.description: Kebab-case unique id, also used as the folder name under site/src/games/.

originalBaseGame.description: The classic game this is based on, e.g. 'Tetris', 'Snake'.

coopSpin.description: How the two-player co-op twist works.

winRules.description: How a round ends and how victory is determined.

moveRules.description: What actions each player can take.

setupInstructions.description: Initial state and any pre-game setup.

buildComplexity.description: Rough estimate of how much work it is to build.

artStyleNotes.description: Visual direction — palette, sprite size, references.
